title: Indagine urbinate: "Così l'algoritmo influenza il voto" - Il Resto del Carlino
snippet: This article from Il Resto del Carlino features an investigation by University of Urbino sociologist Fabio Giglietto, published in early January, detailing how social media algorithms can influence elections and democracy. The study, which analyzed over 2.5 million Meta posts, found a significant reduction in visibility for Italian parliamentarians while extremist content remained highly visible. The article also mentions the study was covered by the Rai3 program 'Report' and was the subject of a European Parliament inquiry.
description: An article from Il Resto del Carlino reporting on an investigation by University of Urbino sociologist Fabio Giglietto, published in early January, detailing how social media algorithms impact elections and democracy.

title: Indagine urbinate: "Così l’algoritmo influenza il voto" - Il Resto del Carlino

title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: Published on April 17, 2026, this article discusses the findings of Fabio Giglietto's study, "A Pretty Blunt Approach: Meta's Political Content Reduction Policy and Italian Parliamentarians' Facebook Visibility," which was published on January 2, 2026. The article highlights how Meta's algorithm allegedly favored anti-European right-wing parties during recent elections and notes that Giglietto's findings were featured on a Rai3 TV program on April 12, 2026, and prompted an inquiry in the European Parliament on January 13, 2026.
description: This article reports on Fabio Giglietto's recent study concerning Meta's algorithmic policies and their impact on political visibility, highlighting its discussion on TV and in the European Parliament.

title: Katharina Esau Was Awarded an ARC Discovery Early Career Researcher Award 2026 - Oncodaily
IA GENERATIVA E MEDIA - Tenuto da Fabio Giglietto - A.A. 2025/2026 - CFU 6
snippet: This is a course listing from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo for the academic year 2025/2026, where Fabio Giglietto is the lecturer for the "Generative AI and the Media" (IA GENERATIVA E MEDIA) course. The course focuses on understanding and critically analyzing the impact of generative AI on the contemporary media system, including the risks of disinformation.
description: This is a course listing from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo for the academic year 2025/2026, where Fabio Giglietto is the lecturer for a course on Generative AI and its impact on media and disinformation.
